title: helichrysum lejolyanum
intro: Helichrysum lejolyanum is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. Helichrysum lejolyanum is said to have health benefits, such as reducing pain, inflammation, and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antioxidant properties that may help protect against cell damage and disease. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies, including essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
